candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above financing section, but it is a generic total and not clearly attributable specifically to the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of goods sold' / 'Changes in Inventory'). Adding it to COGS would risk misallocation and double counting.
Specific amortization component, but not labelled as COGS/cost of sales related. Also appears as a sub-component of broader D&A disclosures rather than a clear COGS-only line.

variables.notes: Visible D&A rows are generic operating-level amounts, not explicitly tied to COGS/cost of sales. No clear COGS-specific D&A row is shown, so conservative treatment is to add nothing separately.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above financing section and therefore potentially outside 'Sales and administration costs', but it is a generic total not clearly attributable specifically to SG&A/admin versus COGS or other operating buckets.
Operating amortization component, but not labelled as SG&A/admin/R&D related and could be part of broader operating D&A disclosures. Using it for XSGA_DA would be speculative.

variables.notes: The statement shows separate D&A lines, but none are explicitly mapped to SG&A/admin or R&D. Because 'Sales and administration costs' is the selected XSGA bucket and the available D&A rows are generic totals, adding them to XSGA would be uncertain and may misallocate or double count.
